title: Zem (miner)
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Zem}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Zem.jpg]] |name=Zem |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]][[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] |gender= |pronouns= |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Get your own ride, squatter! We're ''all'' refugees now!|Zem, to Zayne Carrick, during the Mandalorian "attack"|}} '''Zem''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Mining/Legends|miner]] who worked on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vanquo]] around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. Unconcerned by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] threat nearing Vanquo, Zem worked the night shift at their [[Unidentified mining outpost|outpost's]] [[Comm unit/Legends|comm system]]. In [[3964 BBY]], the outpost was visited by a young [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]], whom Zem took pleasure in tormenting—unbeknownst to Zem, the "refugee" was actually fugitive [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]], who was engineering a plot to clear the camp so that he and his friends could take their supplies. Carrick and his partner [[Jarael]], through a fake emergency transmission and a timely Jedi [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]], convinced Zem and the other miners that the Mandalorians were [[Ground warfare/Legends|attacking]] Vanquo, prompting them to evacuate. ==Biography== {{Dialogue|Zem|See? It wasn't over the official Republic channel.|Zayne Carrick|It is over the official channel.|Zem|It ''is'' over the official channel!|Night watch leader|But you just said—|Carrick|The planet is under attack.|Zem|The planet is under attack!|attr=Zem being mind tricked by Zayne Carrick|src=}} [[File:ZemVanquo.png|thumb|right|310px|Zem (left) managed the comm system of the Vanquo mining outpost.]] A [[Human/Legends|Human]], Zem was, as of the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[3964 BBY]], employed as a [[Mining/Legends|miner]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Vanquo]]. Zem worked at a [[Unidentified mining outpost|mining outpost]] nestled within Vanquo's [[Mountain/Legends|mountainous]] terrain, manning the settlement's [[Comm unit/Legends|communications system]] and often exchanging jests and pranks with a miner named [[Zava]] at a [[Outpost 2|different outpost]]. By 3964 BBY, Vanquo had become part of the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line|front lines]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] nascent [[Mandalorian Wars|war]] with the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|clans]]. Although the Mandalorians were not far away, their conquests sending a steady stream of [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]] to seek shelter on Vanquo, Zem was completely unconcerned with the Mandalorian threat. One night, a miner caught a young man sneaking around the camp's food stores, bringing him into the main tent where Zem was seated at the comm system. Zem delighted in tormenting the stranger, who claimed to be a refugee from [[Suurja]], before the [[Unidentified night watch leader|night watch leader]] took pity on the refugee and offered him food. At that moment, Zem brought up an incoming [[holograph]]ic transmission, showing a [[Jarael|woman]] purporting to be [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Q'Anilia]] in combat. "Q'Anilia" informed the miners that the Mandalorians were landing in force on the other side of the planet, and ordered all present to evacuate immediately. [[File:ZemVanquo2.png|thumb|left|310px|Zem (left) panicked after being mind tricked into believing Vanquo was under attack.]] Zem immediately realized that the transmission was fake, as it did not come over the official Republic channel—however, the young refugee, in actuality fugitive former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Zayne Carrick]], used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Mind trick/Legends|trick]] Zem into saying it was over the official channel, driving him into a panic over the supposed Mandalorian [[Ground warfare/Legends|attack]]. Zem sounded the evacuation siren as several explosions rocked the area of the camp, fleeing with the rest of the miners in a [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. Although Carrick chased after the ship, Zem closed the door and shut the former Padawan out. In truth, Carrick had masterminded the whole affair. He; his [[Arkanian Offshoot/Legends|Arkanian Offshoot]] friend Jarael, or "Q'Anilia"; and his other companions had orchestrated the fake attack in order to easily plunder the outpost of its supplies. However, shortly after their false Mandalorian invasion, the Mandalorians [[Battle of Vanquo|attacked]] Vanquo in earnest, eventually seizing the planet.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|There's an aid station on the other side.''"
"''Other side? Of the mountains?''"
"''Of the ''planet,'' stench! Start walking if you want to beat winter!|Zem and Zayne Carrick|}} A gruff individual, Zem enjoyed being cruel to the refugees caught around their camp, seeing them as pests who would interfere with the business being run at the outpost. Although the Mandalorian threat loomed nearby, Zem was completely unconcerned, believing that the Republic and Mandalorians would continue their stalemate indefinitely. Easily bored while working the night shift, Zem often entertained himself by joking with other mining posts over the comm system. They were weak-willed enough to be affected by a Jedi mind trick, and was quick to panic when they believed that the Mandalorians were attacking. Zem had light skin, with [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. ==Equipment== Zem wore a yellow miners' [[Helmet/Legends|helmet]] featuring a light and gray [[Goggles/Legends|goggles]]. They also donned a gray [[Clothing/Legends|bodysuit]], on top of which they put on a brown chestplate with buckles, straps, and yellow pouches around the waist. To complete their outfit, the miner wore brown, knee-high [[Boot/Legends|boots]], yellow [[Glove/Legends|gloves]], and kept a few tools tucked into openings on their [[Limb/Legends|arm]] loops. ==Behind the scenes== Zem appeared in [[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]], a [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] written by [[John Jackson Miller]], illustrated by [[Dustin Weaver]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 26]], [[2006]].{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/12-893/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-7|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #7}} ==Appearances== *[[Knights of the Old Republic 7|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 7]] {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Zem (miner)}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Zem |pl=Zem }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Miners]]
